_meta.methodology: Rating based on entry-level paid tier cost per month. If the free tier is genuinely useful for most users, the tool earns $ regardless of paid tier. Scale: $ = free or <$10/mo, $$ = $10-25/mo, $$$ = $25-60/mo, $$$$ = $60-150/mo, $$$$$ = $150+/mo or enterprise-only.

rating_scale.$: Free or under $10/mo — or free tier alone is genuinely useful

ChatGPT.notes: Free tier is genuinely capable. Plus $20/mo adds GPT-4o, image gen, Deep Research.

Claude.notes: Free tier usable with daily limits. Pro $20/mo, Max $100/mo for heavy use.

Gemini.notes: Free tier is strong. AI Pro $19.99/mo adds Gemini 3.1 Pro and Deep Research.

Grok.notes: Basic Grok free on X. Full access via X Premium+ ~$22/mo or SuperGrok $30/mo.

DeepSeek.notes: Fully free web chat. API is extremely cheap ($0.14/$0.28 per 1M tokens). No meaningful paid consumer tier.

Le Chat (Mistral).notes: Free tier is solid. Pro $14.99/mo adds priority access and higher limits.

Perplexity.notes: Free tier includes limited Pro searches per day. Pro $20/mo unlocks unlimited searches and deep research.

ChatGPT Deep Research.notes: Requires ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo) or higher. Not available on free tier.

Gemini Deep Research.notes: Full Deep Research requires Google AI Pro $19.99/mo. Limited access on free tier.

Elicit.notes: Free tier includes unlimited search across 138M+ papers. Plus $10/mo adds systematic review tools. Pro $49/mo.

Consensus.notes: Free tier includes 15 Pro messages/month. Premium $8.99/mo. Good for casual academic research.

Scite.notes: Free tier is very limited. Individual paid plan around $20/mo for full Smart Citations access.

Cursor.notes: Free tier limited. Pro $20/mo with unlimited Tab completions. Business $40/user/mo.

GitHub Copilot.notes: Free tier available (limited completions). Pro $10/mo with 1,500 credits. Max $100/mo for heavy use.

Devin Desktop.notes: Formerly Windsurf (Codeium), rebranded to Devin Desktop June 2026. Free tier limited. Pro $20/mo.

Claude Code.notes: API-based pricing. Included in Claude Pro ~$17-20/mo. Heavy use billed per token (~$3/1M for Sonnet).

Aider.notes: Fully open source and free. You pay only for the LLM API you connect (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic).

Continue.dev.notes: Free and open source. Bring your own API key. No subscription cost for the tool itself.

Cline.notes: Free VS Code extension. Uses your own API key — you pay per token for whichever model you choose.

Google Flow.notes: Currently available through Google Labs. Deeper access via Google AI Pro $19.99/mo.

Midjourney.notes: No free tier. Basic $10/mo (3.3hr GPU), Standard $30/mo, Pro $60/mo (Stealth Mode), Mega $120/mo.

ChatGPT Images.notes: Image generation very limited on free tier. Full access with Plus $20/mo.

Black Forest Labs.notes: No free credits on bfl.ai — pay-per-use API pricing. FLUX models are open-weight so you can run them locally for free if you have the hardware.

Ideogram.notes: Free tier includes ~10 slow generations per day. Paid plans start around $8/mo.

Recraft.notes: Free tier available with daily generation limits. Pro around $12/mo for more credits.

Stable Diffusion.notes: Fully open source and free to run locally. No subscription needed. Hardware is the only cost.

Microsoft Copilot.notes: Free tier includes DALL-E image generation and GPT-4o access. Pro $20/mo adds priority and Office integration.

Veo.notes: Accessed via Google AI Studio (free) and Google Flow. Broader access with Google AI Pro $19.99/mo.

Runway.notes: Free tier has very limited credits. Standard $12/mo, Pro $28/mo, Unlimited $76/mo.

Kling.notes: Free tier: 10 credits/day, watermark, 480p. Standard $10/mo for 660 credits, no watermark.

Hailuo.notes: Free tier with watermark and daily caps. Paid plans start ~$10/mo.

Pika.notes: Free tier available. Paid plans start at $8/mo.

Luma Dream Machine.notes: Free tier limited. Plus $30/mo for 10,000 credits. Best per-video pricing at high volume.

ElevenLabs.notes: Free tier includes 10k characters/mo. Starter $5/mo (30k chars, commercial use). Covers voice and music.

Cartesia.notes: Free tier: 10k credits, no commercial use. Pro $5/mo: 100k credits, commercial use, voice cloning.

PlayHT.notes: Free tier limited. Creator plan and above include instant voice cloning. Pricing starts ~$20/mo.

OpenAI Voice.notes: Voice mode limited on free. Full access with ChatGPT Plus $20/mo. API pricing separate.

NotebookLM Audio Overviews.notes: Fully free via Google NotebookLM. No paid tier required for audio overviews.

Suno.notes: Free tier: ~50 credits/day (~10 songs). Pro $10/mo. Strong free tier for casual use.

Udio.notes: Free tier limited. Standard $10/mo. Commercial rights clarity is still being verified.

Spotify AI DJ.notes: Available on both free and Premium Spotify. Premium $9.99/mo removes ads and adds offline listening.

YouTube Music AI Playlists.notes: AI playlist feature available on free tier. Premium $10.99/mo removes ads and adds offline playback.

Soundraw.notes: No meaningful free tier. Paid plans $10-50/mo. Royalty-free license included.

Epidemic Sound.notes: Free trial only. Personal plan ~$15/mo for creators. Commercial plans higher.

Musicfy.notes: Free tier limited. Paid plans start ~$10/mo.

Gamma.notes: Free tier: 400 AI credits (enough to start). Plus $8/mo (or $10 monthly), Pro $15/mo.

Tome.notes: NOTE: Tome shut down its Slides feature in April 2025. Currently limited functionality. Verify before recommending.

Beautiful.ai.notes: No meaningful free tier. Pro $12/mo with unlimited AI presentations.

Canva AI.notes: Free tier is very generous — most AI features accessible. Pro $12.99/mo removes limits and adds brand kits.

Notion AI.notes: Standalone $10 AI add-on retired May 2025. Full AI now bundled in Business $20/user/mo.

NotebookLM.notes: Fully free. Google offers NotebookLM with no paid tier requirement for core features.

Mem.notes: Previously $14.99/mo. Pricing may have changed with Mem 2.0 — verify directly.

Obsidian AI.notes: Obsidian itself is free (even for commercial use). Sync $10/mo optional. AI plugins use your own API key — no tool subscription cost.

Julius.notes: Free: 15 messages/month. Pro ~$29/mo (annual). Targeted at data analysts and researchers.

Hex.notes: Community (free) plan for individuals. Paid starts at $36/editor/mo. AI features and GPU cost extra.

Dataiku.notes: Enterprise-only pricing, no public rates. Intended for large organizations. Contact sales.

Tableau Pulse.notes: Pulse is included free with Tableau Cloud. Tableau Standard starts at $15/user/mo, Creator at $75/user/mo.

n8n.notes: Self-hosted version is completely free. Cloud Starter €24/mo (~$26). Free self-hosted is the recommended starting point.

Make.notes: Free tier: 1,000 ops/month. Core $9/mo for 10,000 ops — very competitive vs Zapier.

Zapier.notes: Free: 100 tasks/month. Professional $19.99/mo for 750 tasks. Note: each step in a multi-step Zap counts separately.

OpenAI Agents.notes: The Agents SDK/framework is free and open source. You pay only for the OpenAI API tokens your agents consume.

LangGraph.notes: Open source (MIT), fully free to use. LangGraph Platform hosted service $99/mo + compute. Most users self-host for free.

CrewAI.notes: Open source (MIT), fully free to use. CrewAI+ hosted/enterprise $99/mo. Framework itself costs nothing.

Ollama.notes: Completely free and open source. Runs models locally on your hardware. No subscription.

LM Studio.notes: Completely free desktop app for running local models. No subscription.

Open WebUI.notes: Free and open source. Self-hosted. Only cost is your own server/hardware.

Jan.notes: Completely free and open source offline AI app. No subscription or API key needed.

Fathom.notes: Most generous free tier in the category — unlimited recordings, 5 AI summaries/month. Premium $19/mo for unlimited AI summaries.

Fireflies.notes: Free tier limited to 800 mins storage and 3 AI summaries. Pro $18/user/mo.

Otter.notes: Free tier limited. Pro $16.99/mo with more transcription minutes and AI features.

Granola.notes: Free basic plan with limited meeting history. Starter $14/user/mo for full features.

Adobe Firefly.notes: Free tier with limited monthly generative credits. Standard $9.99/mo (2,000 credits), Pro $19.99/mo.

Figma AI.notes: AI features in beta, included with Figma Professional $15/editor/mo. AI credit limits vary by plan.

Lovable.notes: Free tier limited. Starter ~$25/mo. Account-based pricing (not per-seat) makes it better value for teams.

Bolt.notes: Free tier with limited tokens. Basic ~$25/mo. Supports more frameworks than most competitors.

v0.notes: Free tier with limited generations. Premium $20/mo. Specializes in production-quality React/Tailwind components.

Replit.notes: Free tier limited. Core $20-25/mo includes AI Agent access and $25 in usage credits.

Wix AI.notes: Free tier includes AI builder but shows Wix ads. Light $17/mo removes ads and adds custom domain.

Meta AI.lowest_paid_plan: Meta One Plus (testing in select regions)
Meta AI.notes: Core product fully free; built into WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook. Meta One paid tiers ($7.99/$19.99) being piloted as of June 2026.

You.com.notes: Free tier good for light use. Pro $20/mo for unlimited queries across research, code, and writing modes.

Kiro.notes: Free tier = 50 credits/mo (~5-10 tasks). Pro $20/mo (1,000 credits). Replaces Amazon Q Developer (EOS Apr 2027).

Tabnine.notes: Free tier retired in 2024. Dev $12/mo, Enterprise $39/mo. Privacy-first; runs completions on-premise for regulated industries.

Leonardo AI.notes: Free = 150 credits/day but images are public. $12/mo Apprentice for private generations and more credits.

Krea.notes: Free = 100 daily compute units. Basic $9/mo for 5,000 credits + commercial license.

Wispr Flow.notes: Free = 2,000 words/week. Pro $15/mo for unlimited dictation. 14-day Pro trial, no card required.

Lindy.notes: 400 credit trial; Plus $49.99/mo. Voice calls billed extra at $0.19/min. No permanent free tier.

HeyGen.notes: Free = 3 watermarked videos/mo (720p, 3 min max). Creator $29/mo for unlimited + 200 credits. 175+ language lip sync.

Synthesia.notes: Free = 10 min/mo watermarked. Starter $29/mo (or $18/mo annual) removes logo. SOC 2 Type II, enterprise-grade.

D-ID.notes: No permanent free tier. Lite ~$5.90/mo — lowest-cost entry into AI avatar video.

Grammarly.notes: Free = grammar + spell check + 100 AI prompts/mo. Pro $12/mo (annual) or $30/mo (monthly). Works across all apps via browser extension.

Jasper.notes: 7-day trial requires credit card. Creator $39/mo annual or $49/mo monthly. Aimed at marketing teams.

Copy.ai.notes: Free = 2,000 words/mo, no card required. Chat $29/mo (annual) with 5 seats + 15K credits.
